ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., Initialization, Market Matching) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the phase */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the phase (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truffle_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truffle test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the truffle test (e.g., 00_base.js, 01_workerPoolCreation.js) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the truffle test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* The result of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* The duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function (e.g., createWorkerPool, createApp) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the contract the function belongs to */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* A JSON string of input parameters for the function */,
  "output_parameters" TEXT /* A JSON string of output parameters for the function */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the function is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract (e.g., IexecHub, Marketplace, WorkerPool, App) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* The blockchain address of the contract */,
  "abi" TEXT /* The Application Binary Interface (ABI) of the contract */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the actor who deployed the contract */,
  "deployed_on" TEXT /* The date and time when the contract was deployed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the contract is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor (e.g., Marketplace Creator, iexec-scheduler, iexec-worker, appProvider) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actor */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* The type of the actor (e.g., creator, scheduler, worker, provider) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* The date and time when the actor was created */,
  "last_active_on" TEXT /* The date and time when the actor was last active */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the actor is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the order */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the order belongs to */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the actor who placed the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* The status of the order (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* The date and time when the order was created */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* The date and time when the order was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the log entry belongs to */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that was performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the log entry belongs to */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that was performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_logs_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
